event: Allegorical Triumph of a Dutch Ruler
symbols: warrior on white horse — victorious ruler or conqueror in triumphal procession
kneeling woman — allegorical figure of a conquered land or supplicating virtue
putti bearing a coat of arms — celestial endorsement of earthly authority
classical architecture — the legitimacy of rule rooted in ancient tradition
description: A wide, panoramic composition showing a triumphal procession. At center, an armored figure in a plumed helmet rides a white horse, wearing a flowing red cape. A woman in white kneels before the horse. Cherubs fly above carrying a coat of arms. Lions flank the scene at left. A large crowd of figures fills both sides, some armed, some in classical dress. At right, classical architecture and columns are visible. The scene is grand, theatrical, and richly populated with allegorical figures and animals.
